name: Creamy Maple Syrup Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and stir in the flour, mixing well.
2. Beat the egg yolks with the maple syrup and water.
3. Add the yolk mixture to the butter-flour mixture and cook over boiling water until thick and creamy, stirring most of the time.
4. Add the walnuts and let cool.
5. Pour into an 8-inch pie shell or divide into 6 individual tart molds lined with pastry.
To make chiffon maple tarts:
1. Beat 2 egg whites until stiff.
2. Fold the beaten whites into the cooked maple cream.
3. Pour into baked tart shells.
